This '''scout craft''' was a well-armed civilian-legal ship.<ref name="SW47:DW">[[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' (1977) 47]]</ref>

==Design==
[[File:Blockade_runner_luke.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Aft view of the vessel]]

The design of the ship followed that of larger [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunships]] used throughout the galaxy, although on a smaller scale than the [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 frigate]] which is in turn smaller than the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]. It had a bank of three engines. Like other Corellian gunships, its bow was a single forward-pointing pod.<ref name="SW47:DW" /><ref name="SOTG07" />

Despite the scaling down, the ship was still rather well-armed, with seven cannons that could be fired by remote. These included forward guns and side batteries.<ref name="SW47:DW" />

==History==
[[File:Gnships.jpg|thumb|left|Luke's blockade runner (right) approaches a larger [[Rebel ship of the line]].]]

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] acquired this ship from [[Jorman Thoad]], a starship dealer on the planet [[Centares/Legends|Centares]], in exchange for [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade's]] [[Spoilt Sport|space yacht]] which they had acquired from [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]]. Greyshade's ship was more valuable, but also far more identifiable, necessitating a switch.<ref name="SW25:SAY" />

Luke believed the ship wasn't as sturdy as Thoad had claimed as the shields failed when they took a single hit from an explosive mine, but Leia informed him this was not necessarily the case, as the mine was a [[heavy duty mine]], capable of collapsing the shields of even larger spacecraft. Eventually Skywalker and Organa made it back to the Rebel base on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] where the ship was refurbished by the maintenance personnel.<ref name="SW25:SAY" />

Luke took the runner on his next mission to determine the extent of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|Sector]], and to acquire essential parts for the Rebellion from [[Feriae Junction/Legends|Feriae Junction]].<ref name="SW27:ROTH">[[Star Wars (1977) 27|''Star Wars'' (1977) 27]]</ref>

Skywalker also used the craft in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] to ferry the remains of an [[Imperial warbot]] to [[Kligson's Moon/Legends|Kligson's Moon]] for repairs.<ref name="SW47:DW" />
